title: lotus corniculatus var. tenuis
intro: Lotus corniculatus var. tenuis, also known as narrow-leaved birds-foot trefoil, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to be beneficial in treating various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Lotus corniculatus var. tenuis is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in modern medicine.
